139 P1AJ P1AJ_TRACH_CARE 38ag(P1aj)Special Care - Tracheostomy Care CHAR 1 Indicates the patient received tracheostomy care. Includes cleansing of tracheostomy and cannula. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
140 P1AK P1AK_TRANSFUSION 38ah(P1ak)Special Care - Transfusions CHAR 1 Indicates the patient received transfusions. Includes transfusions of blood or any blood products which are administered directly into the bloodstream. 0 = Unchecked, 1 =
